creator: glen.j.barber@gmail.com
text:
Microsoft's Research site no longer contains the UNIX-HATERS HANDBOOK[1].  The attached patch updates the target URL to a PDF[2] of this handbook.

[1] - http://research.microsoft.com/en-us/um/people/daniel/unix-haters.html
[2] - http://simson.net/ref/ugh.pdf

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
